name: Almond Joy Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and 1 can of sweetened condensed milk in a double boiler until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture over the bowl containing 3 cups of sweetened, flaked coconut.
3. Add 1 teaspoon of vanilla extract and a pinch of salt. Mix well until the coconut is completely coated.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a cookie sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Press a whole almond into the top of each cookie.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F for 10 to 12 minutes, checking at 8 minutes as the bottoms brown quickly.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool before removing from the pan.
